prompt: Create a dynamic anime-style rooftop cheerleader illustration at night, vertical 4:5 composition, with two high-school cheerleaders in motion above a brightly lit modern city skyline. The scene shows exactly 2 girls: one taller girl in the upper right leaping diagonally across the frame with one bare leg extended downward, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt, navy vest, red necktie, navy shorts, and a flowing white ribbon or sash; and one shorter girl in the lower left leaning forward as if running or cheering, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt, red necktie, and dark skirt. Both characters should have simplified featureless or softly blurred faces with no readable facial details. Use exactly 3 visible pom-poms: two large yellow-and-white pom-poms held by the upper girl, one at the upper left and one at the upper right, and one yellow-and-white pom-pom held low at the bottom left by the lower girl. Set the characters on a high rooftop or balcony with a glass-and-metal railing at the lower right, overlooking dense skyscrapers full of glowing blue-white windows. The sky is deep navy with tiny stars, and the city lights create a cinematic blue glow. Character details: upper girl has dark brown hair with a pink hair clip; lower girl has light brown bob hair. Use crisp Japanese anime illustration with clean line art, dramatic foreshortening, glossy highlights, and vibrant night lighting. Add a small turquoise watermark-like text on the left side over the skyline reading STABLE DIFFUSION XL with tiny subtext SINCE 2023. Keep the image energetic, polished, and poster-like, with sharp outlines on the characters and a detailed photorealistic-anime hybrid city background.
